title: Seamless (Immersive Portals)
description: An immersive portals pack made to play with friends in build battles
body:
# SEAMLESS
## An immersive portals pack focused on build battles with friends
### This pack is a focus on adding mods to complete the immersive portals experience:
- Gravity Changing
- Size Changing
- World Edit for fast building
- Better command block system
- Multiplayer built in with Essential
- Vertical slabs so there are a few more ways to confuse your friends!
### More planned for the future, such as improved performance, confusing blocks, and voicechat!
